# PERF-171 negative: sync.Mutex for acquire/release
lang: go
file: PERF-171-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

var counterMu sync.Mutex
var counterMap = map[string]int{}

func Inc(key string) {
	counterMu.Lock()
	// Map mutation: not a simple counter, so a mutex is
	// justified (PERF-131 would not fire here).
	counterMap[key]++
	counterMu.Unlock()
}
